commit.message: ✅ Y0P8RY verified: Phase 2 migration complete | details: no additional core cleanup changes required at this stage.

excerpts: Restructure agent registry into JSON files
Split every reusable agent prompt into a dedicated JSON file under .AGENTS for easier maintenance.
- Confirmed agent registry lives under .agent-plane/agents as JSON.
- Closed the legacy backfill task to match current state.
title: Restructure agent registry into JSON files
